name: io.github.Neverlow512/agent-droid-bridge
title: Agent Droid Bridge
description: MCP server giving AI agents eyes and hands inside Android devices via ADB

environmentVariables.name: ADB_EXECUTION_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Security mode. 'unrestricted' allows all shell commands with an optional denylist. 'restricted' allows only commands in ADB_SHELL_ALLOWLIST.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_ALLOW_SHELL
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to block all adb shell commands regardless of execution mode.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the ADB binary. Use a full path if adb is not on your system PATH.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_EXTRA_TOOL_PACKS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of extra tool packs to load. Set to 'app_manager' to enable 9 additional app management tools.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_DENIED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool names to hide from the agent at startup.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_SHELL_ALLOWLIST
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of shell commands permitted in restricted mode. Empty blocks all shell commands.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_SHELL_DENYLIST
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of shell commands blocked in unrestricted mode.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable session logging. Requires MCP_LOG_DIR.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the directory where session logs are written. Required when MCP_LOG_ENABLED is true.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_COMMAND_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum seconds to wait for any ADB command.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_SCREENSHOT_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a screenshot capture.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_UI_CHANGE_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Default timeout in seconds for detect_ui_change.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_UI_CHANGE_POLL_INTERVAL
environmentVariables.description: How often in seconds detect_ui_change polls the UI hierarchy.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_AAPT_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum seconds to wait for aapt dump badging, used by the app_manager pack.

environmentVariables.name: ADB_CONFIG_SOURCE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'yaml' to load configuration from adb_config.yaml instead of environment variables.
